title: Bridge Essay: Neuroanthropology of shamanic trance: a case study with a ritual specialist from

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Formless/Absorption** with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Formless absorption — meditative absorption, samadhi, jhana, trance states, transcendental meditation, non-ordinary states of consciousness.

**Neuroanthropology of shamanic trance: acase study with aritual specialist from Mexico.** — Front Psychol. PMID: 38505362. DOI: 10.3389/fpsyg.2024.1325188. In Mexico, shamans are recognized for the gift of entering adeep trance that allows them to know the origin of the diseases and conflicts that afflict people. They commonly treat patients through limpias (cleansing) to extract negative elements sent by awitch or that were "collected" in places that harbor "evil winds." We present acase study of an 81-year-old Mexican shaman who noticed her gift in childhood. Electroencephalographic recordings were made while the shaman performed three activit...

notes: Auto-acquired from PubMed/MEDLINE on 2026-07-12. Phase 8 (Formless/Absorption). Evaluation: Excellent (score=10.2)
